allow: Bash(node -e "const mysql = require\(''mysql2/promise''\); \(async \(\) => { try { const conn = await mysql.createConnection\({ host: ''127.0.0.1'', user: ''root'', password: ''JJkk5789!@'' }\); const [rows] = await conn.query\(''SHOW DATABASES LIKE ""studysphere""''\); console.log\(''Connected! DB exists:'', rows.length > 0\); if \(rows.length === 0\) { await conn.query\(''CREATE DATABASE studysphere''\); console.log\(''Created studysphere database''\); } await conn.end\(\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''Error:'', e.message\); } }\)\(\)")

Bash(OMC_SHELL_READY_TIMEOUT_MS=90000 omc team 2:claude "StudySphere feature work — 2 independent workers. Worker 1 \(auditor\): explore the full codebase, compare every feature against the CLAUDE.md 'What is Built' and 'What to Implement Next' sections, identify what is fully done / partially done / missing, then update CLAUDE.md with accurate findings and a refreshed priority list. Worker 2 \(builder\): implement the highest-priority product features from CLAUDE.md 'What to Implement Next' — Session Goals \(new SessionGoals table + Group.js exit flow\), In-UI confirmation dialogs replacing all window.confirm\(\) calls, and Email verification \(set isVerified=true on register + send verification email\). HARD CONSTRAINT for both workers: do NOT read or modify any RAG files — ragRetriever.js, embeddingService.js, embeddingSync.js, openai.js \(services\), Ai.js route, ContentEmbeddings model.")

hooks.command: powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; \$n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; \$n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Application; \$n.BalloonTipTitle = 'Claude Code'; \$n.BalloonTipText = 'Task completed'; \$n.Visible = \$true; \$n.ShowBalloonTip(4000); Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; \$n.Dispose()"
